title: FunctionTypeValues
description:
A Function that executes, calculates, validates, or processes operational transactions or business activities.

Comment:
Examples: Payment processing, interest calculation, cashback processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Processing Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that executes, calculates, validates, or processes operational transactions or business activities.

Examples: Payment processing, interest calculation, cashback processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Management Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that administers, controls, configures, or maintains operational resources, settings, or arrangements.

Comment:
Examples: Limit management, account management, collateral management.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that observes, tracks, analyzes, or supervises operational status, activity, performance, or compliance.

Comment:
Examples: Fraud monitoring, transaction monitoring, financial status tracking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fulfillment Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that delivers, executes, or completes a customer request, instruction, or operational obligation.

Comment:
Examples: Card issuance, loan disbursement, claim fulfillment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorization Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that approves, authenticates, validates, or grants permission for an operational action.

Comment:
Examples: Payment authorization, access authorization, approval processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Maintenance Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that updates, repairs, adjusts, or maintains operational records, configurations, or product information.

Comment:
Examples: Product maintenance, account update maintenance, beneficiary maintenance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that finalizes, reconciles, clears, or settles financial or operational obligations.

Comment:
Examples: Payment settlement, securities clearing, cashback settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that generates, prepares, distributes, or provides operational or regulatory information.

Comment:
Examples: Compliance reporting, account statement generation, audit reporting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Servicing Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that supports ongoing operational handling and customer servicing activities after origination.

Comment:
Examples: Loan servicing, card servicing, account servicing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Control Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that enforces operational rules, restrictions, limits, or governance requirements.

Comment:
Examples: Amount block control, compliance control, risk control.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Assessment Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that evaluates, reviews, scores, or determines operational or financial conditions.

Comment:
Examples: Credit assessment, collateral valuation, risk assessment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Allocation Function
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Function that assigns, distributes, reserves, or allocates operational or financial resources.

Comment:
Examples: Cashback allocation, collateral allocation, fund allocation.
